titles.title: He Didn't Have to Do It, But He did

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well, He didn't have to do it, but He did I can say, He didn't have to do it, but He did He woke me up this morning He started me on my way Yeah, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well, He didn't have to do it Thank God, He did I can say, He didn't have to do it, but He did He woke you up this morning Yes, He started you on your way Yeah, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well, He didn't have to save us Thank God, He did I can say, He didn't have to save us, but He did He woke us up this morning, And He started us on our way Yeah, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now, I can say the Lord He has been so good to me I'm a witness I can say, the Lord has been so good to me Don't you know He shook me And then, He woke me And then, He started me on my way Yeah, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Well, He didn't have to save us Thank God, He did And He didn't have to save us, but He did Don't you know He shook me And then, He woke me And then, He started me on my way Yeah, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now, He didn't have to go to this place Thank God, He did Yes, He didn't have to go to this place But He did, yeah! We got the Seven Thunder Message And we received the Super Anointing Oh, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Now, I can say the Lord He has been so good to me Can I hear a witness? I can say the Lord, He has been so good to me, yeah Don't you know He shook me And then, He woke me And then, He started me on my way Yeah, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Now, I can say the Lord He has been so good to me I can say the Lord has been so good to me Don't you know He shook me And then, He woke me And then, He started me on my way He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: He didn't have to save us Thank God, He did I can say, He didn't have to save us, but He did He went down to that dimension He took the keys from Satan Yes, He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Now, I can say the Lord, He has been so good to me (I'm a witness) Now, I can say the Lord, He has been so good to me (So good to me) Don't you know He shook me And then, He woke me And then, He started me on my way He didn't have to do it, but He did

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Well, He didn't have to save me But we thank God, He did I can say, He didn't have to save me, but He did He went down to that dimension And He took the keys from Satan Lord, You didn't have to do it, but You did

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Now, I can say the Lord, He has been so good to me (I'm a witness) Now, I can say the Lord, He has been so good to me (So good to me) Don't you know He shook me And then, He woke me And then, He started me on my way He didn't have to do it, but He did…
